mapper.sql: r.visit_state IN (3, 5, 6) AND r.id NOT BETWEEN 1001 AND 1005

AND ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_history_event he WHERE he.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM medical_record mr INNER JOIN medical_record_disease mrd ON mrd.medical_record_id = mr.id WHERE mr.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM medical_record mr WHERE mr.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM patient_health_observation pho WHERE pho.register_id = r.id ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM inspection_request ir WHERE ir.register_id = r.id AND ir.inspection_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(ir.inspection_result) <> '' ) OR EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM check_request cr WHERE cr.register_id = r.id AND cr.check_result IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(cr.check_result) <> '' ) )
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", r.deptment_id AS "departmentId", COALESCE(fe.priority_level, fp.priority_level, 'normal') AS "priorityLevel", COALESCE(fe.interview_interval_days, fp.interview_interval_days, 7) AS "interviewIntervalDays", COALESCE(fe.observation_interval_days, fp.observation_interval_days, 1) AS "observationIntervalDays", ( EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_enrollment fe0 WHERE fe0.register_id = r.id AND fe0.status = 'active' ) OR fp.register_id IS NOT NULL ) AS "enrolled", COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) AS "monitoringEmployeeId", ( SELECT e.realname FROM employee e WHERE e.id = COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) LIMIT 1 ) AS "monitoringEmployeeName", COALESCE(fe.monitored_at, fp.monitored_at) AS "monitoredAt", COALESCE(fe.follow_up_deadline, fp.follow_up_deadline) AS "followUpDeadline", ( SELECT MAX(c.contact_date) FROM follow_up_contact_record c WHERE c.register_id = r.id ) AS "lastContactDate", ( SELECT MAX(s.schedule_date) FROM follow_up_day_schedule s WHERE s.register_id = r.id AND s.item_type = 'interview' AND s.status = 'completed' ) AS "lastInterviewDate", EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_daily_observation o WHERE o.register_id = r.id AND o.observation_date = #{targetDate} ) AS "observedToday", EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_day_schedule s WHERE s.register_id = r.id AND s.schedule_date = #{targetDate} AND s.item_type = 'interview' AND s.status = 'planned' ) AS "interviewScheduledToday", EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_contact_record c WHERE c.register_id = r.id AND c.contact_date = #{targetDate} ) AS "contactedToday", ( SELECT MAX(s.schedule_date) FROM follow_up_day_schedule s WHERE s.register_id = r.id AND s.item_type IN ('interview', 'observation') AND s.status IN ('planned', 'completed') ) AS "lastTrackedDate", ( SELECT MIN(upcoming.work_date) FROM ( SELECT s.work_date FROM follow_up_shift_contact_task t INNER JOIN follow_up_staff_shift s ON s.id = t.shift_id WHERE t.register_id = r.id AND t.status = 'planned' AND s.work_date >= CURRENT_DATE UNION ALL SELECT p.work_date FROM follow_up_pending_schedule p WHERE p.register_id = r.id AND p.status = 'pending' AND p.work_date >= CURRENT_DATE ) upcoming(work_date) ) AS "nextContactDate" FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' WHERE
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_patient_profile fp_demo WHERE fp_demo.register_id = r.id AND fp_demo.department_id = #{departmentId} )
ORDER BY CASE COALESCE(fe.priority_level, fp.priority_level, 'normal') WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, r.real_name

SELECT s.id AS "id", s.register_id AS "registerId", s.department_id AS "departmentId", s.schedule_date AS "scheduleDate", s.item_type AS "itemType", s.title AS "title", s.status AS "status", s.created_by AS "createdBy" FROM follow_up_day_schedule s WHERE s.id = #{id} LIMIT 1

SELECT id AS "id", register_id AS "registerId", observation_date AS "observationDate", observed_by AS "observedBy", confirmed_at AS "confirmedAt", note AS "note" FROM follow_up_daily_observation WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND observation_date = #{observationDate} LIMIT 1

SELECT e.id AS "employeeId", e.realname AS "realName", d.dept_name AS "departmentName", d.id AS "departmentId" FROM employee e LEFT JOIN department d ON d.id = e.deptment_id WHERE e.id = #{employeeId} LIMIT 1
SELECT deptment_id FROM register WHERE id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO follow_up_patient_profile ( register_id, department_id, priority_level, interview_interval_days, observation_interval_days, monitoring_employee_id, monitored_at, follow_up_deadline ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{departmentId}, COALESCE(#{priorityLevel}, 'normal'), COALESCE(#{interviewIntervalDays}, 7), COALESCE(#{observationIntervalDays}, 1), #{monitoringEmployeeId}, #{monitoredAt}, COALESCE(#{followUpDeadline}, (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '180 days')::date) ) ON CONFLICT (register_id) DO UPDATE SET department_id = EXCLUDED.department_id, priority_level = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.priority_level, follow_up_patient_profile.priority_level), interview_interval_days = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.interview_interval_days, follow_up_patient_profile.interview_interval_days), observation_interval_days = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.observation_interval_days, follow_up_patient_profile.observation_interval_days), monitoring_employee_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.monitoring_employee_id, follow_up_patient_profile.monitoring_employee_id), monitored_at = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.monitored_at, follow_up_patient_profile.monitored_at), follow_up_deadline = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.follow_up_deadline, follow_up_patient_profile.follow_up_deadline)

INSERT INTO follow_up_enrollment ( register_id, managing_department_id, priority_level, interview_interval_days, observation_interval_days, enrolled_by, status, monitoring_employee_id, monitored_at, follow_up_deadline ) VALUES ( #{registerId}, #{departmentId}, COALESCE(#{priorityLevel}, 'normal'), COALESCE(#{interviewIntervalDays}, 7), COALESCE(#{observationIntervalDays}, 1), #{enrolledBy}, 'active', #{monitoringEmployeeId}, #{monitoredAt}, COALESCE(#{followUpDeadline}, (CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '180 days')::date) ) ON CONFLICT (register_id) DO UPDATE SET managing_department_id = EXCLUDED.managing_department_id, priority_level = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.priority_level, follow_up_enrollment.priority_level), interview_interval_days = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.interview_interval_days, follow_up_enrollment.interview_interval_days), observation_interval_days = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.observation_interval_days, follow_up_enrollment.observation_interval_days), enrolled_by = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.enrolled_by, follow_up_enrollment.enrolled_by), monitoring_employee_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.monitoring_employee_id, follow_up_enrollment.monitoring_employee_id), monitored_at = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.monitored_at, follow_up_enrollment.monitored_at), follow_up_deadline = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.follow_up_deadline, follow_up_enrollment.follow_up_deadline), status = 'active'
mapper.update: UPDATE follow_up_enrollment SET monitoring_employee_id = #{employeeId}, monitored_at = NOW(), follow_up_deadline = COALESCE(follow_up_deadline, (enrolled_at::date + INTERVAL '180 days')::date) WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND status = 'active' AND (monitoring_employee_id IS NULL OR monitoring_employee_id = #{employeeId})

UPDATE follow_up_patient_profile SET monitoring_employee_id = #{employeeId}, monitored_at = NOW(), follow_up_deadline = COALESCE(follow_up_deadline, (enrolled_at::date + INTERVAL '180 days')::date) WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND (monitoring_employee_id IS NULL OR monitoring_employee_id = #{employeeId})

UPDATE follow_up_enrollment SET monitoring_employee_id = NULL, monitored_at = NULL WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND (monitoring_employee_id = #{employeeId} OR #{forceRelease} = TRUE) AND status = 'active'
UPDATE follow_up_patient_profile SET monitoring_employee_id = NULL, monitored_at = NULL WHERE register_id = #{registerId} AND (monitoring_employee_id = #{employeeId} OR #{forceRelease} = TRUE)
mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) AS "monitoringEmployeeId", COALESCE(fe.managing_department_id, fp.department_id) AS "departmentId" FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", COALESCE(fe.managing_department_id, fp.department_id, r.deptment_id) AS "departmentId", COALESCE(fe.priority_level, fp.priority_level, 'normal') AS "priorityLevel", COALESCE(fe.interview_interval_days, fp.interview_interval_days, 7) AS "interviewIntervalDays", COALESCE(fe.observation_interval_days, fp.observation_interval_days, 1) AS "observationIntervalDays", COALESCE(fe.enrolled_at, fp.enrolled_at) AS "enrolledAt", (fe.status = 'active') AS "enrolled", COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) AS "monitoringEmployeeId" FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id WHERE r.id = #{registerId} LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_enrollment fe WHERE fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' ) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_patient_profile fp WHERE fp.register_id = r.id )
mapper.select:
SELECT r.id FROM register r WHERE
AND ORDER BY r.id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM register r WHERE
AND

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM register r WHERE
AND r.deptment_id = #{departmentId} AND

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.real_name AS "realName", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", COALESCE(fe.priority_level, fp.priority_level, 'normal') AS "priorityLevel", ( SELECT MIN(upcoming.work_date) FROM ( SELECT s.work_date FROM follow_up_shift_contact_task t INNER JOIN follow_up_staff_shift s ON s.id = t.shift_id WHERE t.register_id = r.id AND t.status = 'planned' AND s.work_date >= CURRENT_DATE UNION ALL SELECT p.work_date FROM follow_up_pending_schedule p WHERE p.register_id = r.id AND p.status = 'pending' AND p.work_date >= CURRENT_DATE ) upcoming(work_date) ) AS "nextContactDate" FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id WHERE ( fe.register_id IS NOT NULL OR fp.register_id IS NOT NULL ) AND COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) = #{employeeId} ORDER BY "nextContactDate" NULLS LAST, r.real_name ASC

SELECT r.id AS "registerId", r.case_number AS "caseNumber", r.real_name AS "realName", r.gender AS "gender", r.age AS "age", r.deptment_id AS "departmentId", COALESCE(fe.priority_level, fp.priority_level, 'normal') AS "priorityLevel", COALESCE(fe.interview_interval_days, fp.interview_interval_days, 7) AS "interviewIntervalDays", COALESCE(fe.observation_interval_days, fp.observation_interval_days, 1) AS "observationIntervalDays", true AS "enrolled", COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) AS "monitoringEmployeeId", ( SELECT e.realname FROM employee e WHERE e.id = COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) LIMIT 1 ) AS "monitoringEmployeeName", COALESCE(fe.monitored_at, fp.monitored_at) AS "monitoredAt", COALESCE(fe.follow_up_deadline, fp.follow_up_deadline) AS "followUpDeadline", ( SELECT MAX(c.contact_date) FROM follow_up_contact_record c WHERE c.register_id = r.id ) AS "lastContactDate", ( SELECT MAX(s.schedule_date) FROM follow_up_day_schedule s WHERE s.register_id = r.id AND s.item_type = 'interview' AND s.status = 'completed' ) AS "lastInterviewDate", EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_daily_observation o WHERE o.register_id = r.id AND o.observation_date = #{targetDate} ) AS "observedToday", EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_day_schedule s WHERE s.register_id = r.id AND s.schedule_date = #{targetDate} AND s.item_type = 'interview' AND s.status = 'planned' ) AS "interviewScheduledToday", EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM follow_up_contact_record c WHERE c.register_id = r.id AND c.contact_date = #{targetDate} ) AS "contactedToday", ( SELECT MIN(upcoming.work_date) FROM ( SELECT s.work_date FROM follow_up_shift_contact_task t INNER JOIN follow_up_staff_shift s ON s.id = t.shift_id WHERE t.register_id = r.id AND t.status = 'planned' AND s.work_date >= CURRENT_DATE UNION ALL SELECT p.work_date FROM follow_up_pending_schedule p WHERE p.register_id = r.id AND p.status = 'pending' AND p.work_date >= CURRENT_DATE ) upcoming(work_date) ) AS "nextContactDate" FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' WHERE
AND COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) = #{employeeId} ORDER BY CASE COALESCE(fe.priority_level, fp.priority_level, 'normal') WHEN 'critical' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 ELSE 3 END, r.real_name

SELECT r.id FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id WHERE
AND AND COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) IS NULL ORDER BY r.id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id WHERE
AND AND COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) IS NOT NULL

SELECT COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) AS "employeeId", COUNT(*) AS "patientCount" FROM register r LEFT JOIN follow_up_enrollment fe ON fe.register_id = r.id AND fe.status = 'active' LEFT JOIN follow_up_patient_profile fp ON fp.register_id = r.id WHERE
AND AND COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) IS NOT NULL GROUP BY COALESCE(fe.monitoring_employee_id, fp.monitoring_employee_id) ORDER BY "employeeId"
